description:
Introducing Dr. Meena Shah, a respected Health & Life Coach, Motivational Speaker, Pre-natal and Post-natal care expert, and owner of MEdicoMedia. With her expertise, she empowers individuals to achieve wellness goals. As a dynamic speaker, she inspires positive change. Connect with Dr. Meena Shah for transformative guidance and a healthier, happier life.
🌟 Join us for the incredible IDY2023 celebration by IndiaMexico! 🧘‍♀️🌍

Experience the magic of Yoga and celebrate the unity of nations with us. 🙏✨

📅 Date: 21st June 2023
⏰ Time: Non-stop for 24 hours

Discover the power of Yoga, explore Wholistic Health, nurture Mental Health, and unlock the secrets of Happiness. 🌈💆‍♂️💚

Don't miss out on this unforgettable event! Visit our website for more details: www.inmx2000.org/yoga

Let's spread the joy of Yoga together! 🌟🤝

#IDY2023 #IndiaMexico #YogaCelebration #UnityThroughYoga #HealthAndHappiness #GlobalEvent
